creator: nzmjx@yandex.com
text:
This is also the case on 12.0-RELEASE (r3416666), as shown below:

$ uname -a
FreeBSD haruko.local 12.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE r341666 GENERIC  amd64
$ valgrind ./trivial
